name: Avocado Chef Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chopped red leaf lettuce and watercress.
2. Add the thinly sliced mushrooms, pitted black olives, and croutons to the bowl.
3. Toss lightly to mix all ingredients together.
4. Arrange the cubed avocado and sliced hard-cooked eggs on top of the salad mixture.
5. Sprinkle the julienned Swiss cheese over the salad.
6. Add the cooked meat(s) on top.
7. Prepare the vinaigrette just before serving by shaking the dressing.
8. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently to combine all ingredients.
